mapper.sql: id, target_type, target_id, reporter_id, report_reason, report_detail, evidence_urls, report_status, handled_by, handle_result, handled_at, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_report (target_type, target_id, reporter_id, report_reason, report_detail, evidence_urls, report_status, handled_by, handle_result, handled_at, created_at) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reporterId}, #{reportReason}, #{reportDetail}, #{evidenceUrls}, #{reportStatus}, #{handledBy}, #{handleResult}, #{handledAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_report SET target_type = #{targetType}, target_id = #{targetId}, reporter_id = #{reporterId}, report_reason = #{reportReason}, report_detail = #{reportDetail}, evidence_urls = #{evidenceUrls}, report_status = #{reportStatus}, handled_by = #{handledBy}, handle_result = #{handleResult}, handled_at = #{handledAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM forum_report ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM forum_report WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
